name: kspace
description: Connect this agent to a KSpace and publish artifacts for human review.

interface.shortDescription: Connect an agent to a KSpace for human review
interface.longDescription: Log this agent into a user's KSpace (device-authorization flow, like `gh auth login`) and publish documents for structured human review — comments, approve / request-changes, and review events the agent can poll to continue the task.
defaultPrompt: Connect this agent to my KSpace
Show which KSpace this agent is connected to
